name: Rapid7, Inc.
description: Rapid7 is a global leader in AI-powered managed cybersecurity operations, dedicated to advancing organizations’ cyber resilience. Through its open and extensible Command Platform, the company integrates security data with AI and threat intelligence to help customers reduce risk and disrupt attackers. Recognized for its expertise in managed detection and response (MDR), Rapid7 unifies exposure and detection to transform cybersecurity operations for over 11,500 customers worldwide. The company also fosters major open-source communities, including Metasploit and Velociraptor, providing industry-leading insights and proactive security solutions to help organizations build and improve their security programs.
